meta.scope: FF tracker · BB call vs one raiser · heads-up flop · effective stack 0–40 / 40–70 / 70+ BB · open 2.0/2.5/3.0 BB ±0.05
meta.diagnosticCohortLabel: Только 7-max; subset общего 3–9 max, не добавляется повторно
meta.passBaseline: fold = -(1 BB + hero ante); meanEvVsFoldBb = meanNetEvBb + 1 + meanHeroAnteBb

knowledgeContext.rule: Per-hand EV is aggregated with hand weighting; pre-aggregated rates are never averaged unweighted.
